summary: Frontend gallery crop bug fix verified. Atmosphere section renders 5 masonry images with rendered aspect ratios matching natural ratios within 0.12% (well under 2% tolerance). No cropping observed.

images.status: OK - portrait fully shown, head not cut
OK - candles portrait fully visible, candles at bottom shown

critical_code_review_comments: Note: img class still contains 'object-cover' which is a no-op with h-auto (image sizes to natural ratio). It's harmless but 'object-contain' or removing object-fit would be semantically clearer.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gallery masonry fix verified on desktop 1440x900. Screenshot at /app/test_reports/atmosphere_section.jpg confirms full uncropped images. All 5 images (portraits & landscapes) render at natural aspect ratio.
